metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Deep Purple - Smoke on the Water (2024 Remix).flac
metadata.file_name: Deep Purple - Smoke on the Water (2024 Remix).flac
metadata.title: Smoke on the Water (2024 Remix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:50.80] We all came out to Montreux
[00:54.81] On the Lake Geneva shoreline
[00:59.72] To make records with a mobile
[01:05.03] We didn't have much time
[01:08.20] But Frank Zappa and the Mothers
[01:11.99] Were at the best place around
[01:16.66] But some stupid with a flare gun
[01:20.66] Burned the place to the ground
[01:24.64] Smoke on the water
[01:28.51] And fire in the sky
[01:33.17] Smoke on the water
[01:39.22] 
[01:54.61] They burned down the gambling house
[01:58.32] It died with an awful sound
[02:03.14] A Funky Claude was running in and out
[02:08.64] Pulling kids out the ground
[02:11.72] When it all was over
[02:15.25] We had to find another place
[02:19.99] But Swiss time was running out
[02:23.53] It seemed that we would lose the race
[02:27.76] Smoke on the water
[02:32.55] And fire in the sky
[02:36.39] Smoke on the water
[02:42.41] 
[03:55.52] We ended up at the Grand Hotel
[04:00.06] It was empty, cold and bare
[04:02.87] But with the Rolling-truck-Stones-thing just outside
[04:09.05] Making our music there
[04:11.36] With a few red lights, a few old beds
[04:16.20] We made a place to sweat
[04:20.38] No matter what, we get out of this
[04:24.63] I know, I know we'll never forget
[04:28.20] Smoke on the water
[04:32.97] And fire in the sky
[04:36.65] Smoke on the water
[04:43.15] 
[06:04.52] Ah, break your leg, Frank
[06:06.08]
